name: AvoidPremenopausalNeoadjuvantEndocrineTherapy
title: Do not routinely offer neoadjuvant endocrine therapy to premenopausal patients
description: Avoid routine neoadjuvant endocrine therapy outside a clinical trial in premenopausal HR-positive HER2-negative early-stage disease.

coding.display: Hormone receptor positive with human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 negative status
